text:
[
  "Tan Shan Chien's contact information includes email tanshanchien@gmail.com and phone +6016-793-6308",
  "Tan Shan Chien studied Computer Science with a focus on Artificial Intelligence at University Malaya (CGPA 3.90) and completed A levels at Methodist College Kuala Lumpur (CGPA 4.00)",
  "Tan Shan Chien is proficient in Python, C, C++, Java, JavaScript, and assembly, with experience in frameworks including Django, Flask, OpenCV, Pyautogui, Pygame, Glfw, JavaFX, Java Spring Boot, FastAPI, and langchain/graph",
  "Tan Shan Chien works as a Software Engineer at Mindhive, developing RAG pipelines using embedding models and Vision-Language Models, training YOLOv12 for PDF processing achieving over 90% accuracy, and building ByeDB (an agent-based AI platform for natural language-to-SQL querying)",
  "Tan Shan Chien developed AutoDocX (an agentic documentation SaaS backend using Java Spring Boot with code knowledge graphs), a GUI-based automation tool using image recognition that saved three to four hours daily, Piano to MIDI (converting Piano Synthesia videos to MIDI using Gaussian Mixture Model), and a 3D space shooter game in C++ using Raylib with Entity Component System architecture and 6 DOF flight simulation",
  "Tan Shan Chien won Champion at Godamlah Hackathon 2026 for Digital Car Accident Settlement, CodeFest 2025 in Competitive Programming, Codenection 2025 for Documentation using agentic workflow, Physics Hackathon 2025 for Quantum State Tomography with Neural Networks, and Programming League National 2025",
  "Tan Shan Chien placed 3rd at FutureHack 2025 for Data analysis using agentic SQL and was a Finalist at Malaysian Computing Olympiad 2023",
  "Tan Shan Chien was Head of contest protocol and infrastructure at UM Cybersecurity Summit 2025 and President of MCKL Computer Programming Society"
]
json_data: Tan Shan Chien's contact information includes email tanshanchien@gmail.com and phone +6016-793-6308
Tan Shan Chien studied Computer Science with a focus on Artificial Intelligence at University Malaya (CGPA 3.90) and completed A levels at Methodist College Kuala Lumpur (CGPA 4.00)

Tan Shan Chien is proficient in Python, C, C++, Java, JavaScript, and assembly, with experience in frameworks including Django, Flask, OpenCV, Pyautogui, Pygame, Glfw, JavaFX, Java Spring Boot, FastAPI, and langchain/graph

Tan Shan Chien works as a Software Engineer at Mindhive, developing RAG pipelines using embedding models and Vision-Language Models, training YOLOv12 for PDF processing achieving over 90% accuracy, and building ByeDB (an agent-based AI platform for natural language-to-SQL querying)

Tan Shan Chien developed AutoDocX (an agentic documentation SaaS backend using Java Spring Boot with code knowledge graphs), a GUI-based automation tool using image recognition that saved three to four hours daily, Piano to MIDI (converting Piano Synthesia videos to MIDI using Gaussian Mixture Model), and a 3D space shooter game in C++ using Raylib with Entity Component System architecture and 6 DOF flight simulation

Tan Shan Chien won Champion at Godamlah Hackathon 2026 for Digital Car Accident Settlement, CodeFest 2025 in Competitive Programming, Codenection 2025 for Documentation using agentic workflow, Physics Hackathon 2025 for Quantum State Tomography with Neural Networks, and Programming League National 2025
Tan Shan Chien placed 3rd at FutureHack 2025 for Data analysis using agentic SQL and was a Finalist at Malaysian Computing Olympiad 2023
Tan Shan Chien was Head of contest protocol and infrastructure at UM Cybersecurity Summit 2025 and President of MCKL Computer Programming Society
